/cwe/weakness/314.Name: Cleartext Storage in the Registry
/cwe/weakness/314.Description: The product stores sensitive information in cleartext in the registry.
/cwe/weakness/314.ExtendedDescription: Attackers can read the information by accessing the registry key. Even if the information is encoded in a way that is not human-readable, certain techniques could determine which encoding is being used, then decode the information.

ModesOfIntroduction.Note: OMISSION: This weakness is caused by missing a security tactic during the architecture and design phase.
